description: Create a content slide on PE professionals' confidence in PE-backed M&A transactions using a full-layout grouped vertical bar chart comparing 2017, 2018, and 2019 response distributions, with top KPI callouts for overall optimism by year.

header.kicker: PE Outlook 2019 compared to previous years
header.headline: After an optimistic 2017-2018, PE professionals have become less confident in the development of PE-backed transactions
header.sub: M&A transactions with PE involvement by year, 2017-2019 [%]

main.title:
"What change do you expect to see in 2019/'18/'17 regarding the number of completed M&A transactions with PE involvement?"
Overall positive outlook: 2017 52% vs. 2018 51% vs. 2019 31%
